body.text: Many of the changes from this update came from the survey responses so thanks for all the suggestions everyone! There's still more things to add from the survey, but this is it for now until the next update.

texts: Added support for following comment threads, letting users receive notifications when new comments are added.
Added support for placeholder identities in the Team Solver.
Added a slight brightness and grayscale filter on unused sinner icons in the Team Solver to better distinguish them.
Added a copy team code button to Team Solver results.
Added a button to more conveniently add an encounter tag when creating or editing a team build.
Added the markdown toolbar to additional notes for sinners when editing a build.
Added a site customization option to show the community ratings of identities and E.G.Os on their tooltips.
Added advanced filter and sorting options to Company.
Added an owned stats display to Company.
Added a partial grayscale filter on unowned items in Company.
Added site customization backup feature for easier syncing between devices.
Added theme pack filters to the Choive Events and Gifts pages.
Added an option to show encounters in the Floor Planner.
Added a customization option to change how Identity and E.G.O options are displayed in selection menus.
Added autocomplete support for token types when typing in a markdown editor.
Added an option to add additional status icons to display on builds. This is purely cosmetic.
Added an option to swap identity arts between base/uptie versions.
Added a customization option to show ids on tooltips across the site. These are the same ids used for tokens.
Fixed a bug in the Dispense and Training Calculator where max uptied/threadspun items could set Spinchains to NaN, which also affects Threads/Shards depending on the selected source.
Fixed issues in or slightly redesigned a number of UI elements on the site.
